overrides.expect: \mathrm{m} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \mathbf {0} & \text { if   r <   a_{o }} \\ \mathbf {1} & \text { if   r > a_{o }} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \mathrm{m} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \mathbf{0} & \text{ if } r < a_{o} \\ \mathbf{1} & \text{ if } r > a_{o} \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: \text {Decision} (\boldsymbol {q}) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} m _ {1} & \text {if d_{1} ^{2} -d_{2} ^{2} <   c} \\ m _ {2} & \text {if d_{1} ^{2} -d_{2} ^{2} >c} \\ \text {randomly m_{1} or m_{2}} & \text {if d_{1} ^{2} -d_{2} ^{2} = c} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \text{Decision}(\boldsymbol{q}) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} m_{1} & \text{if } d_{1}^{2} - d_{2}^{2} < c \\ m_{2} & \text{if } d_{1}^{2} - d_{2}^{2} > c \\ \text{randomly } m_{1} \text{ or } m_{2} & \text{if } d_{1}^{2} - d_{2}^{2} = c \end{array} \right.
